name: MOVIE SHADOW 🦔❄️♥️🖤
description:
Alone on Christmas 🌆

Maybe you can make his Christmas better? ☃️

━━━━━━◇❖◇━━━━━━━━━━◇❖◇━━━━━━━

Post-Movie: Sonic the hedgehog 3 (2024)

Here's my third Shadow bot, just in time for Christmas! This bot is set after the events of the Sonic 3 movie, during December. I decided to keep it limited for no particular reason, just felt like it! You can make him any age you want, whether it’s for a goofy teen Christmas romance, a heartwarming story about friendship, or anything in between.

Feel free to have him interact with any Sonic characters, whether they’re from the movies, games, or other media. Want to explore Sonadow🖤💙? Shadamy❤️💗? Go for it! The choice is yours.

Have fun, and Merry Christmas, everyone! I absolutely adore movie Shadow—he deserves more bots. I might update this if we get more Shadow lore from the movies since he’s different from his game and comic versions.”
creator: Underskoopypearls
